text:
is the 3rd segment of the 4th episode and the 10th segment overall of the Chibi Theater: Fly, Cadets, Fly! anime, produced by and .

Overview

 Ymir and Christa choose a shopping friend. 

Summary

On the cadets' day off, Christa decides to go shopping in town. Ymir also plans to head there, and the two agree on going together.

Christa starts thinking of inviting the others, to Ymir's disapproval. Christa believes that they would have more fun if everyone goes together, telling Ymir that this is why she is her only friend, with Ymir replying that she only needs her.

Bearing in mind the stuff they will carry back, Christa still suggests to bring someone with them and names multiple cadets to Ymir, who then rejects Jean because he always watches Mikasa; Reiner for always staring at Christa; Sasha because of her food obsession; Armin for being weak; and finally Eren, who Ymir refuses because of Mikasa, adding that they would probably end up being attacked by a Titan if they go with them.

Going outside, Ymir and Christa find Eren, Mikasa, and Armin looking up at a Titan looming over the building, which then eats them all. Inside its stomach, Ymir and Mikasa both lament over their ruined dates. Ymir questions the group about what they were doing there, and Armin tells her that they were also heading into town.
